rationale: Review 2 catches real, diff-grounded naming issues Review 1 missed: the True-typed field whose name asserts a real claim, the content-free `'`-suffixed projection lemma, and the Is-prefix inconsistency (sibling IsUnipotent already uses it), all low-risk in a new consumer-free file. Review 1's blanket approve leaves these standing, so acting on Review 2 yields the better PR.
